goal: Use Windows Computer Use to create a safe vector layout demo in Illustrator.

gui_steps.instruction: Open Illustrator and create a new 1080 by 1080 RGB artboard.
gui_steps.expected_screen_state: A blank square artboard is visible.
gui_steps.fallback_if_failed: Use the generated SVG fallback file.

gui_steps.instruction: Add title text, lines, geometric symbols, and annotation text.
gui_steps.expected_screen_state: Vector objects and annotation text are visible.
gui_steps.fallback_if_failed: Keep the fallback SVG as the deliverable.

gui_steps.instruction: Export SVG, PDF, and PNG under outputs/illustrator_demo/.
gui_steps.fallback_if_failed: Record the failure and keep the fallback SVG.

expected_result: A vector layout demo with optional SVG fallback and GUI evidence.
